concepts.headline: Seven free Google AI courses with certificates.
concepts.subtext: Google is offering free AI courses across writing, research, data, and app building.
data_points: AI Fundamentals: core concepts for professional AI use
AI for Brainstorming: evaluate and prioritize ideas
AI for Research: research faster with Gemini and NotebookLM
AI for Writing: turn meeting notes into clear summaries
AI for Content Creation: generate images and videos
AI for Data Analysis: track metrics and clean data
AI for App Building: build a web app, no code needed
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero pattern on a 1200x630px canvas with 64px edge padding. Header block at top-left: eyebrow label 'GOOGLE AI' in 11px DM Mono uppercase at #888, letter-spacing 0.08em. Headline below in 48px Inter 600, color #111, letter-spacing -0.03em, max-width 520px. Below headline, a 2px horizontal warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) 80px wide, fading to transparent. Seven numbered rows stacked vertically in a 560px-wide left column, each row containing a square number badge (24x24px, background #f0efe9, #555 text, border-radius 0) on the left, a bold 15px item title in #111, and a 13px descriptor in #666 on the same line separated by a colon. 20px gap between rows. Right side of canvas (from x=680 to x=1150) holds a particle dot network: scattered circles 2-6px at 0.08-0.14 opacity in #6b7a7c, connected by 0.5px hairline strokes at 0.06 opacity. Flywheel wordmark bottom-right in 13px DM Mono uppercase at #888. Background #faf9f6.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6 warm off-white. Number badges surface #f0efe9. Headline #111. Item titles #333. Descriptors #666. Eyebrow label #888. Accent bar #d7c8af. Particle dots #6b7a7c at low opacity. Wordmark #888. Structural borders #e5e5e5 as subtle row dividers.
concepts.reasoning: The content is a clean sequential list of seven discrete courses, making numbered_list_graphic the most natural fit. The left-anchored stacked layout preserves Flywheel's editorial restraint, the particle dot network fills the right half without adding noise, and the sparse row design keeps visual density low despite seven items.

concepts.headline: Seven free Google AI courses with certificates.
concepts.subtext: Build practical AI skills across writing, research, data analysis, and app development.
data_points: Fundamentals: core AI concepts for professional use
Brainstorming: evaluate and prioritize ideas with AI
Research: faster synthesis with Gemini and NotebookLM
Writing: turn meeting notes into clean summaries
Content Creation: generate images and videos
Data Analysis: clean data and track performance
App Building: ship a web app without code
concepts.layout_description: 1200x630px canvas, background #ffffff, 72px edge padding. Eyebrow label top-left in 11px DM Mono uppercase #888. Headline 44px Inter 600 #111 below, max-width 500px. Warm sand 2px accent bar 60px wide beneath headline. Seven feature rows in 560px left column: each row has a thin 1px left border #e5e5e5, category name 14px 600 #333 followed by descriptor 14px 400 #666, 18px row gap. Right half reserved for a faint FLYWHEEL watermark at 0.03 opacity and sparse particle dots. Wordmark bottom-right.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff. Headline #111. Category labels #333. Descriptors #666. Row borders #e5e5e5. Accent bar #d7c8af. Watermark #000 at 0.03 opacity. Wordmark #888.
concepts.reasoning: Feature list modality works well when items share a parallel structure but are not strictly sequential steps. This layout treats each course as a feature capability, using the left border rows to create rhythm without heavy visual weight, maintaining Flywheel's premium publication feel.

concepts.headline: Google is giving away seven free AI courses.
concepts.subtext: Certificates included. Covers writing, research, data analysis, brainstorming, content creation, and app building.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement pattern on 1200x630px canvas, background #faf9f6, 80px edge padding. Vertically centered content block, left-aligned, positioned in the left 55% of the canvas. Eyebrow label 'FREE · CERTIFIED · GOOGLE AI' in 11px DM Mono uppercase #888, letter-spacing 0.08em at top of content block. Headline in 56px Inter 600 #111, letter-spacing -0.04em, max-width 560px, two lines, ending with a period. A 2px warm sand bar (#d7c8af) 80px wide, fading right to transparent, sits 24px below the headline. Subtext in 18px Inter 400 #555, max-width 480px, 28px below the accent bar, sentence case with a period. Right 45% of canvas: particle dot network of 18-22 scattered dots, 2-7px, #6b7a7c at 0.08-0.18 opacity, connected by 0.5px hairlines at 0.06 opacity. FLYWHEEL wordmark bottom-left 13px DM Mono uppercase #888. Composition breathes with 60%+ negative space.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6. Headline #111. Eyebrow #888. Subtext #555. Accent bar #d7c8af fading to transparent. Particle dots #6b7a7c at low opacity. Wordmark #888.
concepts.reasoning: A simpler editorial treatment when the headline alone carries the message. The particle dot field on the right creates visual tension against the left-anchored text, exemplifying Flywheel's asymmetric balance principle. This modality suits announcement-style posts where a single clear statement is the primary takeaway.

selection_reasoning: The numbered_list_graphic best serves this content because the post is structurally a sequential list of seven named courses, each with a distinct domain. It delivers maximum information value while honoring Flywheel's editorial restraint through sparse row spacing, square number badges, and a particle dot field that fills negative space without competing for attention. The headline_subtext_card (concept 2) sacrifices too much specific course detail, and the feature_list_graphic is nearly identical to concept 0 but less visually distinct. Concept 0 is the clearest, most purpose-built treatment.
